test.command: cargo test -p swell-core && cargo test -p swell-orchestrator -- context && cargo test -p swell-tools && cargo test -p swell-llm && cargo test -p swell-validation -- validation && cargo test -p swell-state

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document available workspace dependencies for common tasks. Specifically: chrono is available for time/date operations (used in context_pipeline for timestamp-based priority).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: context-pipeline feature uses chrono::DateTime and chrono::Duration for age_hours calculation in TierBuilder::with_conversation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add design pattern documentation for ContextChunkingAssembler - it's a local assembler that receives pre-built PipelineContextItems from external systems (knowledge graph, vector search) rather than directly calling them. This assembler-receiver pattern should be documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: context_pipeline module integrates with context_chunking.rs which converts AST chunks to context items. The assembler takes Vec<PipelineContextItem> rather than directly calling external systems.
